findings_summary.description: Compact summary of ALL findings (BLOCKER, HIGH, MEDIUM) with specific fix instructions for each. This text is passed directly to the plan writer as revision instructions.

verdict_table.description: Markdown table with 12 axes: axis name, PASS/FAIL, issue count

new_issue_count.description: Number of issues in this review that are NEW (not present in any previous review context). On the first review, equals the total issue count.
